/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Xlinker --version-script=/home/jelle/src/VoyeSeqProject/distrho/utils/symbols/lv2-ui.version -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/d_States-lv2-ui.dir/link.d  -o bin/d_States.lv2/d_States_ui.so "CMakeFiles/d_States-lv2-ui.dir/distrho/distrho/DistrhoUIMain.cpp.o"  libd_States-ui.a libd_States.a libdgl-opengl.a -ldbus-1 /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libXcursor.so /usr/lib/libXext.so /usr/lib/libXrandr.so /usr/lib/libGL.so -ldl
